reason: Keep system as risk observer, not trading system.
Convert action verb into route observation.
No execution semantics in Consumer Binding.
Approval may only mean evidence review acknowledgement.
Confirmation may not imply trade or wallet confirmation.
No wallet-connect action surface in read-only panel.
Hard-Block and policy blocks are non-overridable.
Must not render as Trade Failed or Execution Failed.
